title: 400PCS Round Cable Wall Clips, 4 Sizes（4mm 6mm 8mm 10mm) Cable Nail Clips, for Organizing Ethernet, USB Cable, Phone Line and TV Line-Black
features: Find Your Perfect Fit: With four handy sizes to choose from—4mm, 6mm, 8mm, and 10mm (100 pieces per pack)—you'll always have the right clip for the task. Organize everything from thin charger cords to thicker power cables with ease!

Engineered for Durability: Don't settle for flimsy clips! Our Cable Clips are made with high-quality PE plastic and sturdy carbon steel nails to withstand the test of time. They're built to resist corrosion, prevent aging, and won't break or bend—say goodbye to replacements!
Easy Installation: Mounting is simple—just hammer the clips into the wall. They instantly organize your wires and eliminate clutter.

Safety-Focused Design: Designed for home and office use, these versatile cable organizers securely hold wires of various sizes. They effectively prevent children and pets from scratches caused by loose, tangled cables.
Wide Compatibility: From RG8X, RG58, RG59, and LMR 240 coaxial cables to RG6 digital audio/video cables, even everyday USB wires and Christmas lights—this cable organizer handles them all with ease.
